narrative:
Macedonia City has 9,067 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
